ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The username to use for authentication

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The password to use for authentication

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You'll want to do this after changing WebDAV server settings
ast.target: 更改WebDAV服务器设置后，您需要执行此操作

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether or not to sync the full vault. This option is mutually exclusive with partial vault sync, and must be disabled for folder mappings to take effect.
ast.target: 是否同步整个保险库。此选项与部分保险库同步互斥，必须禁用才能使文件夹映射生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to sync the full vault to. This is a path relative to the WebDAV server, and must not include a full URL. Example of a legal value: /livi/obsidian
ast.target: 将整个保险库同步到何处。这是相对于WebDAV服务器的路径，不能包含完整的URL。合法值示例：/livi/obsidian

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used to add sub-maps of the obsidian vault, meaning a specific subfolder that's synced when the rest of the vault isn't. This is only enabled and only takes effect when the full vault sync setting is disabled.
ast.target: 用于添加Obsidian保险库的子映射，即当保险库的其余部分不同步时，同步特定的子文件夹。仅在禁用整个保险库同步设置时启用并生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, the plugin will only tell you what it would've done, but not actually do it. Meaning tell you which files it would change, but not actually do the changes. Useful for debugging, or just making sure you trust the plugin
ast.target: 如果设置，插件将只告诉您它会做什么，但不会实际执行。即告诉您它会更改哪些文件，但不会实际进行更改。对于调试或确保您信任插件很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, files that would've been deleted are not actually deleted. This should mainly be set if you failed to download before making changes, and don't wish to discard the changes you made.
ast.target: 如果设置，本应被删除的文件不会被实际删除。这主要应在您未能在更改前下载，并且不希望丢弃您所做的更改时设置。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重新启动到WebDAV服务器的连接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: WebDAV share for the full vault

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't test connection without a vault folder
ast.target: 没有保险库文件夹无法测试连接

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must supply both the webdav share and local folder
ast.target: 您必须同时提供WebDAV共享和本地文件夹

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The WebDAV share must be in the form of an absolute path in the WebDAV server, for example /some/folder
ast.target: WebDAV共享必须采用WebDAV服务器中的绝对路径形式，例如 /some/folder

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The local folder must be in the form of a vault-relative path, for example some/vault/folder
ast.target: 本地文件夹必须采用相对于保险库的路径形式，例如 some/vault/folder

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: IOU 1x dry run action. Use the modal instead
ast.target: 欠您一次试运行操作。请改用模态框

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You don't appear to have set up the plugin. Go to settings before continuing.
ast.target: 您似乎尚未设置插件。请在继续前前往设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: WebDAV sync: missing URL. Add one in the plugin settings, or disable this plugin
ast.target: WebDAV同步：缺少URL。请在插件设置中添加一个，或禁用此插件

ast.name: error
ast.source: WebDAV sync: Action blocked: detected full vault wipe
ast.target: WebDAV同步：操作被阻止：检测到整个保险库擦除

ast.name: error
ast.source: WebDAV sync: Action blocked: detected full vault wipe. This is likely a bug; please open an issue on GitHub
ast.target: WebDAV同步：操作被阻止：检测到整个保险库擦除。这很可能是一个错误；请在GitHub上提交问题

ast.name: text
ast.source: Running into issues? Open an issue on

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have not configured the sync connection settings. Please set a server, then try again
ast.target: 您尚未配置同步连接设置。请设置服务器，然后重试
